Kevin Zhou

Aspiring Data Scientist

Exploring patterns, predicting possibilities

Currently working on: Google UM-Flint Research
View Projects Read STEMmed In

About

I'm a high school student who likes finding the stories hidden in data.

I build ML models, explore datasets with Python and R, and work on projects that solve real-world problems.

Current Focus

  • Deepening time series forecasting & NLP
  • Mastering model interpretability & deployment

Toolkit

  • Languages: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn), SQL basics
  • ML/DL: TensorFlow, PyTorch (early stage)
  • Visualization: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly
  • Deployment: Streamlit

Philosophy

I learn best by building experiments. Each run, whether it succeeds or fails, teaches something valuable about how data tells stories.
